mapper.select: SELECT TEMP2.WEIGH_OUT_DT, TEMP2.WEIGHT_GOODS FROM (SELECT ID, CARGO_INFO_ID FROM T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST UNION SELECT ID, CARGO_INFO_ID FROM T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST_TRANSFER) TBH JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI ON TBH.CARGO_INFO_ID = TBCI.ID JOIN (SELECT TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID, VWI.WEIGH_OUT_DT, VWI.WEIGHT_GOODS FROM (SELECT TBTC.BUSINESS_NO, TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC JOIN T_BUS_TRUST TBT ON TBTC.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID AND TBT.TYPE IN ('集港', '拆箱集港')) TEMP JOIN V_WEIGHT_INFO VWI ON VWI.IS_OLD = '否' AND TEMP.BUSINESS_NO = VWI.PLAN_NO UNION ALL SELECT TO_NUMBER(VWI2.CARGO_INFO_ID), VWI2.WEIGH_OUT_DT, VWI2.WEIGHT_GOODS FROM V_WEIGHT_INFO VWI2 WHERE VWI2.IS_OLD = '是' AND VWI2.PLAN_TYPE IN ('集港', '拆箱集港')) TEMP2 ON TBCI.ID = TEMP2.CARGO_INFO_ID WHERE TBH.ID = #{handoverlistId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT TEMP2.WEIGH_OUT_DT, TEMP2.WEIGHT_GOODS FROM (SELECT ID, CARGO_INFO_ID FROM T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST UNION SELECT ID, CARGO_INFO_ID FROM T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST_TRANSFER) TBH JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI ON TBH.CARGO_INFO_ID = TBCI.ID JOIN (SELECT TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID, VWI.WEIGH_OUT_DT, VWI.WEIGHT_GOODS FROM (SELECT TBTC.BUSINESS_NO, TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC JOIN T_BUS_TRUST TBT ON TBTC.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID AND TBT.TYPE = '陆销') TEMP JOIN V_WEIGHT_INFO VWI ON VWI.IS_OLD = '否' AND TEMP.BUSINESS_NO = VWI.PLAN_NO UNION ALL SELECT TO_NUMBER(VWI2.CARGO_INFO_ID), VWI2.WEIGH_OUT_DT, VWI2.WEIGHT_GOODS FROM V_WEIGHT_INFO VWI2 WHERE VWI2.IS_OLD = '是' AND VWI2.PLAN_TYPE = '陆销') TEMP2 ON TBCI.ID = TEMP2.CARGO_INFO_ID WHERE TBH.ID = #{handoverlistId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
